mapper.sql: id, auth_letter_id, scene_name, industry, business_scene, decision_level, specific_rule, questionnaire, created_by, created_time, updated_by, updated_time, delete_flag
mapper.select: SELECT FROM auth_letter_scene WHERE auth_letter_id = #{authLetterId} AND delete_flag = 0 ORDER BY created_time DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM auth_letter_scene WHERE auth_letter_id = #{authLetterId} AND delete_flag = 0
SELECT FROM auth_letter_scene WHERE id = #{id} AND delete_flag = 0
SELECT FROM auth_letter_scene WHERE auth_letter_id = #{authLetterId} AND delete_flag = 0 ORDER BY created_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO auth_letter_scene (auth_letter_id, scene_name, industry, business_scene, decision_level, specific_rule, questionnaire, created_by, created_time, delete_flag) VALUES (#{authLetterId}, #{sceneName}, #{industry}, #{businessScene}, #{decisionLevel}, #{specificRule}, #{questionnaire}, #{createdBy}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 0)
mapper.update: UPDATE auth_letter_scene SET scene_name = #{sceneName}, industry = #{industry}, business_scene = #{businessScene}, decision_level = #{decisionLevel}, specific_rule = #{specificRule}, questionnaire = #{questionnaire}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND delete_flag = 0
UPDATE auth_letter_scene SET delete_flag = 1 WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE auth_letter_scene SET delete_flag = 1 WHERE id IN
#{id}
